case_study_exempt_reason: Framework-meta dev-tooling chore (FW-N6, infra-master-plan §3.5.3): builds the quarterly Data Freshness Audit script + make target + tests ahead of its first scheduled run (2026-08-12). No product surface; PR body + this state.json are the provenance record.
summary: N6 (infra-master-plan §3.5.3) — Quarterly Data Freshness Audit. scripts/data-freshness-audit.py asserts four freshness invariants over the gate-telemetry stack using the F17 gate-last-fired index for O(1): A1 emission-key ↔ canonical-name parity (rename-drift class), A2 recent candidacy within a 30d window (event-gated gates → advisory), A3 fire-freshness vs introduction (distinguishes healthy-zero from 0-candidate mis-wire and index inconsistency), A4 test-reference currency (catalog test_files exist + reference the gate name, so a rename KeyErrors a test not prod). Read-only advisory; `make data-freshness-audit STRICT=1` exits 1 on FAIL for future cron/CI gating. 15 unit tests incl. a deliberate-drift test per assertion (F16 regression-proof discipline). Built ahead of the 2026-08-12 first run — the meta-check that would have caught the cache_hits keying drift at landing time.

tasks.title: scripts/data-freshness-audit.py — 4-assertion (A1-A4) quarterly freshness audit over gate-catalog x F17 index x scripts/tests
scripts/tests/test_data_freshness_audit.py (15 tests, deliberate-drift per assertion) + make data-freshness-audit target
